case_title: WEST WIND AUTOMOTIVE VS. RAENETTA TURNER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY WEST WIND AUTOMOTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, RAENETTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.00) SERVED NOV-09-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, RAENETTA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST WIND AUTOMOTIVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER, RAENETTA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2015 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. HEARING HELD, JUDGEMENT RENDERED IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JPT. JEAN MILEFF, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
